case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. SERVICE SCAFFOLD CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERVICE SCAFFOLD CO., INC. $2,575.00 PRINCIPAL, $210.62 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,990.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SERVICE SCAFFOLD CO., INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
